raw.objective: To evaluate the effects of cytochrome P450 (CYP) 2C19, CYP3A5 polymorphisms, co-administration of AED on zonisamide (ZNS) clearance.
raw.covariates: Tested: CYP2C19 and CYP3A5 polymorphisms, WT, dose, comedication with CBZ, PHT, PHB, VPA, CLBZ, CLNZ on CL Included: CYP2C19, body weight, CBZ, PHT, PB, dose.
raw.observations: Only one-compartment open pharmacokinetic model with first-order elimination characterised for ZNS. Lack of goodness-of-fit plots. Autoinduction (clearance dependent on dose) was found. Comedication with CBZ, PHT or PHB gives a 24-29% increase in ZNS clearance.
raw.structure: 1-compartment model with first order absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*((WT/44)**theta2)*(DOSE**theta3)*(theta4**CYP2C19_HEM)*(theta5**CYP2C19_PM)*(theta6**CBZ)*(theta7**PHT)*(theta8**PHB)*exp(eta1) Vd/F=theta9 Ka=theta10 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) CYP2C19_HEM=CYP2C19 heterozygous extensive metabolizer: 1 if true, 0 if not true. CYP2C19_PM=CYP2C19 poor metabolizer: 1 if true, 0 if not true. Carbamazepine (CBZ), phenytoin (PHT), or phenobarbital (PB) is equal to 1 if co-administered, otherwise, it is 0. Parameter values for Ka and Vd were omitted from the paper.
raw.parameter_values: theta1=1.22 theta2=0.77 theta3=-0.17 theta4=0.84 theta5=0.70 theta6=1.24 theta7=1.28 theta8=1.29 theta9=NA theta10=NA omega1=0.076 sigma1=0.050

extraction_target.title: Population estimation regarding the effects of cytochrome P450 2C19 and 3A5 polymorphisms on zonisamide clearance.

structural_model.description: 1-compartment model with first order absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*((WT/44)**theta2)*(DOSE**theta3)*(theta4**CYP2C19_HEM)*(theta5**CYP2C19_PM)*(theta6**CBZ)*(theta7**PHT)*(theta8**PHB)*exp(eta1) Vd/F=theta9 Ka=theta10 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) CYP2C19_HEM=CYP2C19 heterozygous extensive metabolizer: 1 if true, 0 if not true. CYP2C19_PM=CYP2C19 poor metabolizer: 1 if true, 0 if not true. Carbamazepine (CBZ), phenytoin (PHT), or phenobarbital (PB) is equal to 1 if co-administered, otherwise, it is 0. Parameter values for Ka and Vd were omitted from the paper.
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: To evaluate the effects of cytochrome P450 (CYP) 2C19, CYP3A5 polymorphisms, co-administration of AED on zonisamide (ZNS) clearance.

covariates.raw: Tested: CYP2C19 and CYP3A5 polymorphisms, WT, dose, comedication with CBZ, PHT, PHB, VPA, CLBZ, CLNZ on CL Included: CYP2C19, body weight, CBZ, PHT, PB, dose.

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
